name: TCIL_CreatePeerControlAssignment
title: TCIL_CreatePeerControlAssignment
syntax: long TCIL_CreatePeerControlAssignment(dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source, dword elementNumberSource) // form 1
long TCIL_CreatePeerControlAssignment(dword ddi, dword addressUser, dword elementNumberUser, dword addressSource, dword elementNumberSource) // form 2
long TCIL_CreatePeerControlAssignment(node tc, dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source, dword elementNumberSource) // form 3
long TCIL_CreatePeerControlAssignment(node tc, dword ddi, dword addressUser, dword elementNumberUser, dword addressSource, dword elementNumberSource) // form 4
description: The function creates an assignment of a settable process data object (setpoint value user) to a setpoint value source.
On each change of task status from inactive to active, the TC IL initiates assignment messages to both the setpoint value user and the setpoint value source.

The function fails if the Device Process Data (DPD) object of the setpoint value user does not have the property Settable or if the DPD object of the setpoint value user does not have the property Setpoint Source.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: Combination of this DDI and an elementNumberUser resp. elementNumberSource specifies the setpoint value user resp. setpoint value source.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: addressUser
parameters.description: Address of the peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: elementNumberUser
parameters.description: The elementNumberUser / ddi combination that has to receive data from the setpoint value source instead of the TC node.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value source.

parameters.name: addressSource
parameters.description: Address of the peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value source.

parameters.name: elementNumberSource
parameters.description: The elementNumberSource / ddi combination that has to send setpoint value commands to the setpoint value user instead to the TC node.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
